case_title: AMERICAN REALTY & CONSTRUCTION,INC., A CALIF CORP vs. TOWNSEND, ARNOLD

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN REALTY & CONSTRUCTION,INC., A CALIF CORP AS TO DEFENDANT TOWNSEND, ARNOLD SUMMONS ISSUED
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN REALTY & CONSTRUCTION,INC., A CALIF CORP
DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN REALTY & CONSTRUCTION,INC., A CALIF CORP
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TOWNSEND, ARNOLD
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT TOWNSEND, ARNOLD

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN REALTY & CONSTRUCTION,INC., A CALIF CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOWNSEND, ARNOLD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1489 WEBSTER STREET, APT #1404 $9,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,000.00, LEASE FORFEITED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
